text: Operational risks include supply chain disruptions and talent retention. Apple relies heavily on a global supply chain, and any disruptions, such as those caused by natural disasters or geopolitical tensions, could severely impact production and delivery timelines (chunk_id_35dda38d-318e-4e7b-aab2-fdecab9788b8). Talent retention is another critical issue, as the tech industry is highly competitive, and Apple needs to attract and retain top talent to maintain innovation and product development (chunk_id_052d7fd4-14f0-4d94-837c-d714904f9e0d).

Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories worldwide.
